subtopics.title: Linear Regression
subtopics.explanation: Fits a line minimizing squared error between predicted and actual values.

subtopics.title: Multiple Linear Regression
subtopics.explanation: Uses multiple independent variables to predict output.

subtopics.title: Polynomial Regression
subtopics.explanation: Fits polynomial curve instead of straight line.

subtopics.title: Logistic Regression
subtopics.explanation: Uses sigmoid function to predict probability.

subtopics.title: Decision Trees
subtopics.explanation: Splits dataset recursively based on feature values.

subtopics.title: Random Forest
subtopics.explanation: Combines multiple decision trees to reduce overfitting.

subtopics.title: Support Vector Machine
subtopics.explanation: Finds hyperplane with maximum margin between classes.

subtopics.title: K-Nearest Neighbors
subtopics.explanation: Classifies based on closest data points.

subtopics.title: Naive Bayes
subtopics.explanation: Based on Bayes theorem assuming feature independence.

subtopics.title: Gradient Boosting
subtopics.explanation: Builds models iteratively correcting previous errors.
